## Component Name / Entry Point

<!-- What would this component be called? Which entry point? -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? What is missing or painful today? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the API and behaviour you have in mind -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Component renders correctly
- [ ] Keyboard accessible (describe interactions)
- [ ] Screen-reader compatible (describe ARIA role)
- [ ] All design tokens used — no hardcoded colours
- [ ] jest-axe test passes
- [ ] Storybook story with all variants
- [ ] Public API exported from correct entry point

## A11y Requirements

<!-- ARIA role, keyboard nav, focus management, screen reader behaviour -->

## Design Token Requirements

<!-- Which --uilib-* tokens? Any new tokens needed? -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this request -->
